rgb_pixel_t(3) Library Functions Manual rgb_pixel_t(3)

NAME

rgb_pixel_t - RGB pixel structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/rgba/image.h>

Data Fields


uint8_t r
Red color component (0-255). uint8_t g
Green color component (0-255). uint8_t b
Blue color component (0-255).

Detailed Description

RGB pixel structure.

Standard RGB pixel structure with 3 bytes per pixel (R, G, B). Packed structure (no padding) for efficient memory usage.

Note

Structure is packed for wire format compatibility.

Color components are in range 0-255.

Size: 3 bytes per pixel.

Definition at line 81 of file video/rgba/image.h.

Field Documentation

uint8_t rgb_pixel_t::b

Blue color component (0-255).
